waiting.nextQuestion: Got your answer. Drawing up the next question…

error.load: Something went wrong loading this session. Pull to refresh or reopen later.

completed.label: Done
completed.bodyTraining: This one was mostly practice. You saw a few of your blind spots. Next, head to the Distilled view and see what's left of this signal once the noise is filtered out.
completed.bodyEligible: Five rounds done. What's left of this signal once the noise is filtered out is waiting for you in the Distilled view. After you read it, you decide whether to send it to the four analysts (Evidence · Consensus · Timing · Circle of Competence) for review.

question.openPlaceholder: Write your answer in a sentence
question.commitmentPlaceholder: Why this action + duration? Write your exit conditions (price + time + one external signal).
question.userInputPlaceholder: Write the chain you see — which overlooked link, which angle the market missed
question.userInputModalPlaceholder: Which overlooked link, which angle the market missed

clues.label: Related Clues
clues.drawerLoading: Mastra is still pulling external sources, a second or two…
clues.drawerEmpty: No matching external news found for this signal — the reasoning will work straight from what you wrote.

learning.emptyHint: No matching external news found for this signal — the reasoning will work straight from what you wrote.

distilled.label: Distilled
distilled.analysing: Still tracing the financial beneficiary chain…
distilled.silence: This signal has no clear beneficiary mapping. The system chooses to stay silent.

retry.hint: ◆ Waiting over {{seconds}}s for the next question — likely a flaky Socratic output format. Let it try again.
